summary: A real-time care team scheduling and coordination platform built with Django Channels, WebSocket, JWT authentication, and AWS SES/SNS notifications.
description: Matty's Crew is a scheduling platform designed to coordinate care teams efficiently. It features real-time WebSocket updates so the entire team sees schedule changes instantly, a multi-view calendar for managing shifts and appointments, and automated notifications via AWS SES and SNS.

key_features.realtime_updates: Live WebSocket connections push schedule changes to all connected team members instantly — no page refresh needed
key_features.multi_view_calendar: Day, week, and month calendar views for flexible shift management and appointment scheduling
key_features.jwt_auth: JWT-based authentication for secure access across care team members
key_features.notifications: AWS SES for email notifications and SNS for push notifications when schedules change
key_features.coordination: Built to solve a real problem — coordinating care teams efficiently with instant communication

why_this_matters: Matty's Crew shows Matt building real-time systems with WebSocket and Django Channels, plus cloud notification infrastructure with AWS. It solves a genuine coordination problem and demonstrates his ability to build tools for real-world needs.
